tools.name: get_site_summary
tools.description: Get the public Raze site summary and key URLs.

tools.name: get_pricing
tools.description: Get public Raze pricing plans and CTA URLs.

tools.name: list_projects
tools.description: List public Raze project case studies.

tools.name: get_project
tools.description: Get one public project case study summary by slug.

tools.name: get_booking_url
tools.description: Get the public human-facing booking URLs for Raze.

tools.name: get_booking_profile
tools.description: Get the Cal.com booking profile, event slug, booking URL, and required fields for agent bookings.

tools.name: get_available_slots
tools.description: Check available Cal.com time slots for the Raze introduction event. This is read-only.

tools.name: create_booking
tools.description: Create a real Cal.com booking for Raze. Only call this after the visitor selected an available slot and explicitly confirmed the booking.
